title: Ubiquiti UniFi UPS 2U
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi UPS 2 U is a backup power supply unit designed for network devices, ensuring their operation during a power outage. The device features a â2 Uâ rackmount and includes 8 power sockets for connecting equipment. Of these, 4 sockets (C13) provide surge protection, while the remaining 4 sockets (C13) offer combined protection âboth surge and power outage protection . Continuous power is ensured by a (2) hot-swap replaceable batteries , which allow battery replacement while… The device is equipped with a Power button and a Factory Reset button, and features LED indicator . LED indicator displays the status of the device itself and indicates the battery status . At full load , the backup power supply can power connected devices for approximately 2,3 minutes. At half load , the runtime extends to about 8 minutes . Charging the battery to 90 % capacity takes approximately 6 to 8 hours .
